name: Aisha Tyler
bio: Aisha Tyler is an American actress, comedian, and host who returned to stand-up after building a screen career, releasing the 2009 Comedy Central special Aisha Tyler Is Lit: Live at the Fillmore. A Dartmouth graduate, she is widely known for voicing Lana Kane on Archer, recurring on Friends, hosting Whose Line Is It Anyway, and co-hosting The Talk. Her stand-up favors sharp, geeky observational riffs.

timeline.ev: Recurs as Charlie Wheeler on Friends
Releases Comedy Central special Aisha Tyler Is Lit
Begins voicing Lana Kane on FX's Archer
Begins hosting Whose Line Is It Anyway

accolades: Daytime Emmy Award winner as co-host of The Talk
Comedy Central special Aisha Tyler Is Lit: Live at the Fillmore (2009)

specials.t: Aisha Tyler Is Lit: Live at the Fillmore
